description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a prominent gabled roof and a striking glass-walled extension that creates a bright, open living space. The exterior is clad in light gray brick, complemented by large, vertically oriented windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The main section of the house has a traditional rectangular form, while the glass extension adds a contemporary touch with its angular lines and floor-to-ceiling glazing. The roof is primarily gabled, with additional dormer windows providing extra light and space to the upper floor. The entryway is understated, with a simple door and no visible porch or steps, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism. Overall, the house blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for upscale urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern house with a gabled roof, light gray brick exterior, and a dramatic glass-walled extension. Large windows and clean lines define its contemporary style.
description_view_0: This view highlights the glass-walled extension and the main entrance, showing the contrast between the brick facade and the transparent modern addition.
description_view_1: The rear or side view showcases the full height of the glass extension, with large vertical windows dominating the facade and revealing the open interior.
description_view_2: The back view displays the main brick structure with symmetrical dormer windows and a central door, emphasizing the traditional rectangular form.
description_view_3: This side view focuses on the gabled end of the house, showing a single large window and the intersection of the main roof with the glass extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or steps, minimal decorative elements, and clean modern lines
